title: Add rate-limit IP middleware with in-memory Map
description: Create src/middleware/rateLimit.ts with a simple IP-based rate limiter using an in-memory Map, distinct from the existing sliding-window rate-limiter.ts. The middleware should extract the client IP from x-forwarded-for headers, track request counts per IP within a configurable window, and return 429 with Retry-After when the limit is exceeded. Also create co-located unit tests at src/middleware/rateLimit.test.ts. Follow the existing factory-pattern middleware conventions used by request-logger.ts and rate-limiter.ts.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts — Factory pattern returning a middleware object with a store using in-memory Map, config interfaces, and x-forwarded-for IP parsing via byIp helper

src/middleware/rate-limiter.test.ts — Co-located test file using vitest (describe/it/expect/vi), afterEach cleanup with vi.useRealTimers(), NextRequest helper factory, and X-RateLimit-* header assertions
src/middleware/request-logger.ts — Express-style middleware factory (createRequestLogger) returning a middleware object, use of NextRequest/NextResponse
vitest.config.mts — Test pattern: include: ['src/**/*.test.ts'] for co-located tests
